summary.zh-CN: 本次更新是 v0.7.1 之后的稳定性补丁：菜单栏浮窗在切换桌面或全屏空间后更可靠；继续或复制旧 Codex 会话时，历史 Token 不会再被误算成今日成长。
summary.en-US: This stability patch follows v0.7.1: the macOS menu bar popover behaves more reliably across Desktops and full-screen Spaces, and resuming or duplicating old Codex sessions no longer counts carried-over history as today's growth.

zh-CN: macOS 菜单栏浮窗现在可以跨桌面和全屏空间显示，点击状态栏小树时不应该再把你带回原来的桌面。
继续或复制旧 Codex 会话时，旧会话里的历史 Token 不会再被当成今日新增。
这些会话之后真正新产生的 Token 仍会正常计入成长、实时速率和排行榜。
en-US: The macOS menu bar popover can now appear across Desktops and full-screen Spaces, so clicking the status item should no longer send you back to the original Desktop.
When an old Codex session is resumed or duplicated, its existing history is no longer counted as today's new growth.
Real new tokens produced afterward still count toward growth, live rate, and leaderboards.

zh-CN: 修复菜单栏浮窗切到其他桌面或全屏页面后可能不显示、或把系统切回原桌面的问题。
修复继续或复制旧 Codex 会话时，历史 Token 可能被误算成今日新增的问题。
en-US: Fixed the menu bar popover sometimes not appearing, or switching macOS back to the original Desktop, after moving to another Desktop or full-screen Space.
Fixed Codex usage tracking over-counting carried-over history when old sessions are resumed or duplicated.

summary.zh-CN: 本次更新是 v0.7 社交和 macOS 菜单栏体验的补丁版：群组加入流程更完整，资料卡隐私可配置，群组排行榜口径更清楚，菜单栏浮窗的实时速率和排行榜展示也更稳定。升级后，本机小树和已有同步数据都会保留；社交、排行榜和同养小树仍然是可选功能。
summary.en-US: This patch polishes the v0.7 social and macOS menu bar experience: group joining is more complete, profile-card privacy is configurable, group leaderboard semantics are clearer, and the menu bar live-rate and leaderboard views are more stable. Your local tree and existing synced data stay intact; social features, leaderboards, and shared-tree sync remain optional.

zh-CN: 群组加入流程改成申请 / 审批机制：邀请码不再直接把人拉进群，群主或管理员可以统一处理待加入成员。
群主和管理员现在可以直接邀请好友入群，对方会在社交页看到邀请并选择加入或忽略。
资料卡新增隐私设置，可以控制谁能打开你的资料卡，以及是否展示等级、累计 Token、活跃天数和成就陈列。
群组排行榜支持在“总用量”和“入群后贡献”之间切换，同时继续保留 24h、7 天、30 天和全部时间范围。
macOS 菜单栏浮窗继续打磨：实时速率图使用统一口径，排行榜标题明确为 24h，翻页和组件展示也更稳。
排行榜 7 天和 30 天范围现在会展示对应时间范围内有记录的用户，不再只显示当天活跃的人。
en-US: Group joining now uses a request and approval flow: invite codes no longer add people immediately, and leaders or officers can review pending members.
Group leaders and officers can directly invite friends; invited friends can accept or dismiss the invite from the Social page.
Profile-card privacy settings let you choose who can open your card and whether level, total tokens, active days, and achievements are shown.
Group leaderboards can switch between “total usage” and “since-joining contribution” while keeping the 24h, 7d, 30d, and all-time ranges.
The macOS menu bar popover is more polished: live-rate data uses one consistent basis, leaderboard copy says 24h clearly, and paging/component display is steadier.
The 7d and 30d leaderboards now include users with activity in those ranges instead of only users active today.

zh-CN: 修复全球榜和群组榜的 7 天 / 30 天人数异常偏少的问题。
修复当前版本内容在网络不稳定时可能显示英文 GitHub Release 正文的问题。
修复菜单栏实时速率图中端点圆形被拉伸、口径说明容易混淆的问题。
优化同养小树的模型聚合增量同步，减少不必要的重复快照。
补充社交和同步验证，覆盖群组申请、好友邀请、资料卡隐私、排行榜退出和隐私 payload 边界。
en-US: Fixed global and group 7d / 30d leaderboards showing too few users.
Fixed the current-version dialog falling back to English GitHub release notes when the manifest fetch is unstable.
Fixed stretched endpoint circles and confusing basis copy in the menu bar live-rate chart.
Improved shared-tree model aggregate delta sync to avoid unnecessary repeated snapshots.
Expanded social and sync verification for join requests, friend invites, profile privacy, leaderboard leave safety, and privacy payload boundaries.

zh-CN: 社交、排行榜和同养小树仍然都是可选功能。
资料卡隐私只控制聚合展示项，例如等级、累计 Token、活跃天数和成就。
群组榜和资料卡只使用 Token 数字、关系状态和聚合统计；不会上传提示词、回复内容、代码文件、本地路径或会话正文。
en-US: Social features, leaderboards, and shared-tree sync remain optional.
Profile-card privacy only controls aggregate display fields such as level, total tokens, active days, and achievements.
Group leaderboards and profile cards use token counts, relationship state, and aggregate statistics only; prompts, replies, code files, local paths, and session text are not uploaded.

zh-CN: 升级不会清空本机数据。
排行榜本地缓存最长约 1 小时；如果刚升级后还看到旧榜单，稍后会自动更新，也可以使用排行榜页的刷新入口。
如果 macOS 菜单栏图标暂时看不到，可能是系统菜单栏空间不足，可以先收起不常用的状态栏图标。
en-US: Upgrading does not clear local data.
Leaderboard data may be locally cached for up to about one hour; if you still see old standings right after upgrading, they will refresh later, or you can use the leaderboard refresh action.
If the macOS menu bar icon is not visible, the system menu bar may be out of space; hide less-used status items and try again.

summary.zh-CN: 本次更新加入好友与群组社交页、macOS 菜单栏小窗，并继续打磨多设备同养和排行榜体验。升级后，原来的本机小树会继续保留；不登录 GitHub 也可以继续只在本机使用。
summary.en-US: This update adds friends and groups, a macOS menu bar popover, and more polish for shared-tree sync and leaderboards. Your existing local tree stays local after upgrading, and you can keep using Vibe Tree without signing in.

zh-CN: 新增社交页，可以添加好友、创建或加入群组，一起查看成长和排行。
macOS 新增菜单栏小树入口，可以从状态栏快速查看成长、来源、排行榜和同步状态。
菜单栏浮窗支持在设置中选择显示哪些组件，并调整顺序。
登录同一个 GitHub 账号后，可以在多台设备共同养一棵树；其他设备的数据会按真实来源合并展示。
排行榜提供 24h、7 天、30 天和全部视角，并支持可选每小时自动同步。
en-US: The new Social page lets you add friends, create or join groups, and compare growth together.
On macOS, a new menu bar tree gives quick access to growth, sources, leaderboards, and sync status.
Menu bar popover components can be chosen and reordered from Settings.
Sign in with the same GitHub account to grow one tree across devices; remote data is merged back into its real sources.
Leaderboards now include 24h, 7d, 30d, and all-time views, with optional hourly auto-sync.

zh-CN: 设置页继续整理，同步、更新、路径和浮窗组件等选项更容易找到。
加入排行榜确认、同步入口、设备贡献和升级提示等交互做了打磨。
en-US: Settings are further organized so sync, updates, source paths, and menu bar components are easier to find.
Leaderboard confirmation, sync entry points, device contribution, and level-up notices have been polished.

zh-CN: 社交、排行榜和同养小树都是可选功能。
Vibe Tree 不会上传提示词、回复内容、代码文件、本地路径或会话正文。
en-US: Social features, leaderboards, and shared-tree sync are optional.
Vibe Tree does not upload prompts, replies, code files, local paths, or session text.

zh-CN: 升级不会清空本机数据。
如果 macOS 菜单栏图标暂时看不到，可能是系统菜单栏空间不足，可以先收起不常用的状态栏图标。
en-US: Upgrading does not clear local data.
If the macOS menu bar icon is not visible at first, the system menu bar may be out of space; hide less-used status items and try again.
